predicates.name: is_legally_cohabiting_partner_of
predicates.description: The first person is the legally cohabiting partner of the second person.

predicates.name: is_surviving_cohabiting_partner
predicates.description: The person is the surviving legally cohabiting partner after the death of the other partner.

predicates.name: is_predeceased_cohabiting_partner
predicates.description: The person is the predeceased legally cohabiting partner.

predicates.name: is_descendant_of
predicates.description: The first person is a descendant of the second person.

predicates.name: exception_applies
predicates.description: The exception in par. 4 applies: the preceding provisions do not apply because the surviving legally cohabiting partner is a descendant of the predeceased legally cohabiting partner.
